englishDefinitions: an act of pulling someone's underwear up tightly from the back as a prank or bully action
the uncomfortable feeling when underwear is wedged between the buttocks
persianTranslation: کشیدن و بالا بردن لباس زیر از پشت به‌عنوان شوخی یا اذیت کردن
گیر کردن آزاردهنده‌ی لباس زیر بین باسن
examples: The older boys gave him a wedgie as a joke.
He kept pulling at his shorts because he had a wedgie.
A wedgie is a childish and mean prank.
